Unnamed: 1: Slimmed-down workbook for team building and battle simulation prep.
Old helper tabs, duplicate analysis tabs, and non-essential dev sheets.
Only the data needed to build teams, validate teams, and feed the simulator.
Team_Builder, Beast_Database, Beast_Move_Pools, Move_Database, Ability_Database, Item_Database, Battle_Rules, Type_Chart, Terrain, Status_Rules.
This workbook is meant to be the clean source-of-truth before simulation runs.
